title: claytonia parvifolia subsp. flagellaris
intro: Claytonia parvifolia subsp. flagellaris, also known as mountain spring beauty, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the purslane family and is native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Claytonia parvifolia subsp. flagellaris include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant protection, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Claytonia parvifolia subsp. flagellaris include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to support skin health, soothe digestive issues, and promote relaxation.
